name: MPT-7B-StoryWriter-65k+
archDisplay: Decoder-only Transformer w/ ALiBi (65K-token fiction fine-tune)
note: Fiction-focused MPT-7B fine-tune trained at 65k tokens via ALiBi; demonstrated generations to ~84k tokens on a single A100-80GB node.

results.notes: Open LLM Leaderboard-style ARC-Challenge 25-shot score for the StoryWriter fine-tune specifically, relayed via the LLM Explorer aggregator. No official model card/paper score exists for this fiction fine-tune; verified this figure differs from base MPT-7B's ARC score (59.6) on the same aggregator, so it is not a copy-paste artifact.
Open LLM Leaderboard-style HellaSwag (10-shot convention) score for the StoryWriter checkpoint, via LLM Explorer aggregator; distinct from base MPT-7B's 75 on the same site.

Open LLM Leaderboard-style MMLU (5-shot) score for StoryWriter via LLM Explorer aggregator; base MPT-7B scores 27.5 on the same site, matching the independently-confirmed 360Zhinao-paper value, which increases confidence in this aggregator's reliability.
Open LLM Leaderboard-style TruthfulQA (MC2, 0-shot) score for StoryWriter via LLM Explorer aggregator.
Open LLM Leaderboard-style Winogrande (5-shot) score for StoryWriter via LLM Explorer aggregator; notably near-random, plausibly reflecting the model's fiction-only fine-tuning.

F1 score (harness|drop|3, 3-shot) from the HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1's own 'latest' evaluation run (2023-10-16T08:53:05.263222) for mosaicml/mpt-7b-storywriter, per that dataset's README which explicitly designates this run as canonical/latest. Near-zero score plausibly reflects the fiction-only fine-tune degrading general QA ability, consistent with the model's already-tracked near-random Winogrande score from the same official run family (51.14, matching the existing llm-explorer-sourced value exactly). [score corrected during round-6 completeness verify: proposed 0.3 -> 0.32]

5-shot accuracy (harness|gsm8k|5) from the same HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 'latest' run (2023-10-16T08:53:05.263222) for mosaicml/mpt-7b-storywriter. 0% accuracy is a genuine (if unremarkable) recorded score, not a placeholder -- verified directly from the raw results_2023-10-16T08-53-05.263222.json.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via Databricks MPT-7B blog (published 2023-05-05, confirms 65k-token fiction fine-tune and demonstrated generations to 84k tokens matching the note) and HF model card mosaicml/mpt-7b-storywriter (Apache-2.0 license, 65k training context, requires trust_remote_code). No result rows were present to verify. All fields left unchanged.
